<|user|>
Instruction:
Generate a structured dashboard design recommendation based on the given dashboard brief.

Dashboard brief:
Domain: Energy Consumption
Available data fields: facility, meter_id, renewable_kwh, cost, kwh_used
Key metrics to track: Total Energy Usage (kWh), Energy Intensity, Equipment Efficiency
User goals: reduce carbon emissions, benchmark energy intensity, detect downtime patterns
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Energy Consumption dashboard is designed to help users reduce carbon emissions and benchmark energy intensity. It focuses on Total Energy Usage (kWh), Energy Intensity, Equipment Efficiency using data from fields such as facility, meter_id, renewable_kwh.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Total Energy Usage (kWh)",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Filtering controls empower users to focus on relevant subsets of data."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Energy Intensity",
      "user_task": "main KPIs",
      "recommended_chart": "KPI cards",
      "rationale": "Drill-down interactions let users move from summary to detail without leaving the dashboard."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Equipment Efficiency",
      "user_task": "relationship/correlation",
      "recommended_chart": "scatter plot",
      "rationale": "Line charts effectively communicate trends over continuous time periods."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Single-page layout: KPI cards at top, heatmap in center, bar chart and line chart at bottom.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Neutral grey base with accent colors per category. Consistent legend placement.",
  "interactions": [
    "Tooltip on hover",
    "Toggle between chart types",
    "Export to CSV button"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Consistent color coding reduces cognitive load and speeds interpretation.",
    "Line charts effectively communicate trends over continuous time periods."
  ]
}
